description: Overall experience with Qandle is amazing, will suggest to other users also .
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I most liked about Qandle is it's payroll management and Onboarding feature which provides best experience.
cons: As using for long this software is good, yet price feel more , all other are user friendly experience.

description: User Friendly Comprehensive Smooth On-boarding and Off-boarding
author: Gopika R.
pros: Effectivity User Friendly Employee management
cons: No complains as such works great for employee management

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It is really user friendly and the features and options are really less.
cons: Lots of bugs and the application crashes at times. Does not save your login and password.

description: My overall experience with Qandle is very good
author: Shailesh B.
pros: All are about good experience Very good
cons: Attendent system is very punctual and honest

description: Its too Good coz im not used app before
author: Saurabh A.
pros: Interface is very good , All my details available on it
cons: Notifications system of qandle get all information through mail

review_title: And easy ro use feature rich and user-friendly tool
description: A feel good HR tool which is user-friendly and not that complex
author: Sanket S.
pros: The most important thing for me is how easy it is to use and it covers all the important aspects
cons: At some places editing a field and saving it is laggy and can be improved

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The compensation management module is decent, has been able to manage the database of employees with an ease
cons: Lags a lot, customer support has been poor, geo-tagging has an issue, implication of new modules is very slow

author: Kumar G.
pros: 1). Support from Qandle team - 5/5 2). Fluid UI 3). Extremely user friendly 4). All in one product
cons: Full and final module and related reports

review_title: A must have scalable great HRMS
author: Sukhpreet S.
pros: Everything is fabulous. From user management to payroll and capturing right data. Not to mention that their after sales support and continuous customer success teams are simply phenomenal
cons: There has been nothing that is unlikeable about this product.

description: We have been using Qandle for more than 2 years now. We feel happy and satisfied. The team is very helpful and extend support 24*7. Plus they customise modules as per our demands. Trust me, this is the best part!
author: Rimakshi C.
pros: We loved it's interface the maximum. But above all, the recruitment module has helped us to streamline the hiring process. We can now generate various reports from the system.
cons: There can be more improvement in regards to adding more options to the performance modules.

review_title: Great Tool | Really intuitive to Use
description: - Payroll Operations TAT - Transforming and manintaing a High Performance Culture - Query Management - Accuracy and Transparency of Data
author: Mohammad H.
pros: - Intuitive Product for Use - Well Defined Workflows with remarkable UI - True Focus on Customer Service
cons: While it handles important HR processes, they would attain a certain level of depth with time. This is a common issue with all maturing products

author: Shreya R.
pros: Qandle is extremely easy to understand and use. Their support team is always ready to go out of their way to help you and work on the feedback provided by you. As they are also a startup, they will customise and add features according to your needs.
cons: Not a con as such but as a startup they also have their learning curves which might make resolving some of your issues take some time. But they always come through.

author: Nikhil F.
pros: Leaves management is best feature just by clicking on it we can view all our leaves taken and also status for the leave applied for
cons: Cost is bit high rest all features are best
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Mr.Faiz A.
pros: I really like the features and the tools that helps us to access the related things about our organisation and make our every second count.
cons: There errors occur more frequently and lots of corrections should be done to make it bug free.

author: Aviral B.
pros: Helps track employee's attendance with the help of geo-fencing. Helps maintain attendance monitor performance, run payroll with minimal human intervention.
cons: Does not sync with bio-metric machines. Uses shared servers to login attendance which causes a lot of technical glitches at the time of login.

description: Compare to other software this one is too friendly to use and understand.
author: BV S.
pros: It's very easy to use and track ur attendence
cons: Server is slightly slow on peak hours like 10 in the morning

description: Very good app to work and management
author: Nitin M.
pros: Very good app to work and management,I like user interface
cons: Not found anything to dislike, almost it is likeble
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: not a value for money app
author: aditi K.
pros: a good software for employees track record in the organisation
cons: yes, there are lot of features the software needs to improve and needs to work on its user interface

author: Zoya K.
pros: The attendance feature View the leaves of the entire team on a particular day.
cons: The clock in , clock out option especially in the virtual world.

description: Overall experience has been good, 360 degree feedback of qandle is always very informative

cons: The UI is bleak, can be more exciting with good colours. And can have more gamified experience for employees.

author: Partha R.
pros: User friendly, One stop solution for routine activities
cons: Auto clock out feature after twelve hours
